title: Czech Republic Sole Trader Business Registration and Statutory Notifications (Jednotný registrační formulář, JRF, fyzická osoba)
description: The Czech Ministry of Industry and Trade's (Ministerstvo průmyslu a obchodu, MPO) Jednotný registrační formulář (JRF, Unified Registration Form) for a natural person (fyzická osoba) — form 'MPO FO', vzor č. 14 (edition 240101). A single filing reports a trade-licence registration (ohlášení živnosti) or a concession application (žádost o koncesi) under Act No. 455/1991 Sb. (živnostenský zákon) to the applicant's locally competent Trade Licensing Office (živnostenský úřad), and, at the applicant's election in Part E, simultaneously routes the same filing to the Czech Social Security Administration (Správa sociálního zabezpečení, ČSSZ), the applicant's public health-insurance company (zdravotní pojišťovna), and/or the locally competent Tax Office (finanční úřad) — the form's own printed text frames each of these as a distinct notification ('oznamuji ve smyslu zákona... následující skutečnosti'). This document models only the fyzická osoba (natural-person/sole-trader) variant of the JRF; the Ministry separately publishes a distinct právnická osoba (legal-entity) JRF PO form and a separate change/amendment form (ZL, Změnový list), both out of scope for this version. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of the Czech Republic or the Ministerstvo průmyslu a obchodu.

source.documentRef: MPO FO – vzor č. 14 (240101), Jednotný registrační formulář, fyzická osoba

verification.notes: GOV-1804: GovSchema Standard Research cycle. Opens the Czech Republic as the registry's 26th jurisdiction, per this registry's own established pattern of preferring a new jurisdiction over re-screening already-confirmed-dead gaps in the existing 25 (see CATALOG.md's Known Gaps section). Candidates screened first (see VERIFICATION.md for the full record): Austria's Gewerbeanmeldung regional trade-registration forms and Sweden's Transportstyrelsen/Skatteverket forms could not be reached at all from this research environment (TLS connection resets/timeouts to tirol.gv.at and skatteverket.se, consistent with an IP/ASN-level block, while web.archive.org and mpo.gov.cz were both reachable directly — the same class of access problem this registry has hit before with gov.au/riigiteataja.ee, but with no Wayback fallback attempted this cycle given a directly-reachable, stronger alternative was found instead); Switzerland's passport process is online/telephone/cantonal-office based with no downloadable application PDF found. Picked instead: the Czech Ministry of Industry and Trade's (MPO) Jednotný registrační formulář (JRF) for a natural person (fyzická osoba) — a genuine, current (vzor č. 14, edition 240101), unauthenticated, directly downloadable PDF confirmed live this cycle (HTTP 200 from mpo.gov.cz, no login/CAPTCHA/WAF gate), still linked from MPO's own current JRF landing page alongside its 2025-dated field-by-field 'Pokyny' (instructions) companion PDF. Extracted with pdfjs-dist: zero AcroForm/XFA widgets (a static print/hand-fill template, the same shape as this registry's Polish CEIDG-1/PIT-37 and Malaysian JIM/JPJ precedents), but a fully self-documenting numbered layout (11 numbered top-level sections across Parts A-G, every field carrying its own printed lettered sub-label) cross-checked position-by-position via a y/x-sorted text-content re-render (not just linear text extraction, which scrambles this form's multi-column layout) against the Pokyny guide's own section-by-section prose explanation. See VERIFICATION.md for the full candidate comparison, extraction method, and every scope/judgment call.

fields.name: titlePrefix
fields.label: 01.a) titul
fields.description: Academic/professional title placed before the name (e.g. Ing., Mgr.), if any.

fields.name: firstName
fields.label: 01.b) jméno
fields.description: The applicant's first name.

fields.name: surname
fields.label: 01.c) příjmení
fields.description: The applicant's surname.

fields.name: titleSuffix
fields.label: 01.d) titul
fields.description: Academic/professional title placed after the name (e.g. CSc., Ph.D.), if any.

fields.name: gender
fields.label: 01.e) pohlaví
fields.description: The applicant's sex, one of the form's own two options (the paper form presents this as a strike-out-what-does-not-apply 'žena / muž' pair).

fields.name: birthSurname
fields.label: 01.f) rodné příjmení
fields.description: The applicant's birth surname, if different from the current surname.

fields.name: previousSurnames
fields.label: 01.g) všechna dřívější příjmení
fields.description: Free-text list of all the applicant's previous surnames, if any.

fields.name: maritalStatus
fields.label: 01.h) rodinný stav
fields.description: The applicant's marital status. The printed form leaves this as an open blank rather than a closed checkbox list, so it is modelled as free text.

fields.name: placeOfBirth
fields.label: 01.i) místo narození
fields.description: The applicant's place of birth.

fields.name: birthDistrict
fields.label: 01.j) okres
fields.description: District of the applicant's place of birth.

fields.name: birthCountry
fields.label: 01.k) stát
fields.description: Country of the applicant's place of birth.

fields.name: citizenship
fields.label: 01.l) státní občanství
fields.description: The applicant's declared citizenship.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: 01.m) datum narození
fields.description: The applicant's date of birth.

fields.name: personalIdNumber
fields.label: 01.n) rodné číslo
fields.description: The applicant's rodné číslo (Czech birth/personal identification number), in DDMMYY/XXXX form. Left blank by an applicant who has never been assigned one, who instead supplies personIdentificationNumber below.

fields.name: personIdentificationNumber
fields.label: 01.o) identifikační číslo osoby
fields.description: The applicant's identifikační číslo osoby (IČO), an 8-digit alternate identifier used only by an applicant who has already been assigned one and has no rodné číslo (per the form's own instructions, 'Vyplní osoba, které již bylo identifikační číslo přiděleno').

fields.name: businessFirmName
fields.label: 01.p) obchodní firma
fields.description: The applicant's registered business name (obchodní firma), filled in only by a person already entered in the commercial register (obchodní rejstřík); a first-time sole-trader applicant not yet entered there leaves this blank and trades under their own name.

fields.name: residenceStreet
fields.label: 02.a) název ulice
fields.description: Street name.

fields.name: residenceHouseNumber
fields.label: 02.b) č.p. / č.ev.
fields.description: House (conscription) number or, for a building lacking one, the registration (evidence) number.

fields.name: residenceOrientationNumber
fields.label: 02.c) číslo orientační
fields.description: Orientation number (a supplementary street-facing number distinct from the house/conscription number, common in Czech addressing).

fields.name: residencePostalCode
fields.label: 02.d) PSČ
fields.description: Postal code (PSČ).

fields.name: residenceMunicipality
fields.label: 02.e) název obce
fields.description: Municipality (obec) name.

fields.name: residenceMunicipalityPart
fields.label: 02.f) část obce
fields.description: Part of municipality (část obce), used where a municipality is subdivided.

fields.name: residenceDistrict
fields.label: 02.g) okres
fields.description: District (okres).

fields.name: residenceCountry
fields.label: 02.h) stát
fields.description: Country, when the address is outside the Czech Republic.

fields.name: seatSameAsResidence
fields.label: 03.a) sídlo trvale shodné s bydlištěm
fields.description: Whether the business seat address (sídlo) is declared permanently identical to the residential address above, per footnote 2) on the source form ('vyplní pouze osoba, která má adresu sídla shodnou s adresou bydliště'). When true, changes to the residential address automatically carry over to the seat address; when false, the distinct seat address fields below apply.

fields.name: seatStreet
fields.label: 03.b) název ulice
fields.description: Street name.

fields.name: seatHouseNumber
fields.label: 03.c) č.p. / č.ev.
fields.description: House (conscription) number or, for a building lacking one, the registration (evidence) number.

fields.name: seatOrientationNumber
fields.label: 03.d) číslo orientační
fields.description: Orientation number (a supplementary street-facing number distinct from the house/conscription number, common in Czech addressing).

fields.name: seatPostalCode
fields.label: 03.e) PSČ
fields.description: Postal code (PSČ).

fields.name: seatMunicipality
fields.label: 03.f) název obce
fields.description: Municipality (obec) name.

fields.name: seatMunicipalityPart
fields.label: 03.g) část obce
fields.description: Part of municipality (část obce), used where a municipality is subdivided.

fields.name: seatDistrict
fields.label: 03.h) okres
fields.description: District (okres).

fields.name: seatCountry
fields.label: 03.i) stát
fields.description: Country, when the address is outside the Czech Republic.

fields.name: foreignResidenceStreet
fields.label: 04.a) název ulice
fields.description: Street name.

fields.name: foreignResidenceHouseNumber
fields.label: 04.b) č.p. / č.ev.
fields.description: House (conscription) number or, for a building lacking one, the registration (evidence) number.

fields.name: foreignResidenceOrientationNumber
fields.label: 04.c) číslo orientační
fields.description: Orientation number (a supplementary street-facing number distinct from the house/conscription number, common in Czech addressing).

fields.name: foreignResidencePostalCode
fields.label: 04.d) PSČ
fields.description: Postal code (PSČ).

fields.name: foreignResidenceMunicipality
fields.label: 04.e) název obce
fields.description: Municipality (obec) name.

fields.name: foreignResidenceMunicipalityPart
fields.label: 04.f) část obce
fields.description: Part of municipality (část obce), used where a municipality is subdivided.

fields.name: foreignResidenceDistrict
fields.label: 04.g) okres
fields.description: District (okres).

fields.name: foreignResidencePermitUntil
fields.label: 04.h) povolený pobyt do
fields.description: Date the applicant's permitted residence in the Czech Republic runs until, applicable only to a foreign applicant whose stay has been permitted or confirmed (per footnote 3, EU citizens included).

fields.name: businessActivityDescription
fields.label: 05. Předmět podnikání (pořadové číslo 1.)
fields.description: Description of the first (pořadové číslo 1.) business activity being reported/applied for, stated with sufficient definiteness and precision per the form's own instructions. A second and further business activity is reported on a separate 'Předmět podnikání' annex — see documents[].additionalBusinessActivitiesAnnex — and is out of scope for this schema version.

fields.name: freeTradeCategoryNumbers
fields.label: 05. u živnosti volné vyznačte čísla oborů činnosti na seznamu
fields.description: For an unregulated trade (živnost volná) only: the activity-category number(s), from the Ministry's own 'Seznam oborů činností náležejících do živnosti volné' list, that the business activity above falls under. Not applicable to a craft (řemeslná), bound (vázaná), or licensed (koncesovaná) trade.

fields.name: premisesStreet
fields.label: 06.a) název ulice
fields.description: Street name.

fields.name: premisesHouseNumber
fields.label: 06.b) č.p. / č.ev.
fields.description: House (conscription) number or, for a building lacking one, the registration (evidence) number.

fields.name: premisesOrientationNumber
fields.label: 06.c) číslo orientační
fields.description: Orientation number (a supplementary street-facing number distinct from the house/conscription number, common in Czech addressing).

fields.name: premisesPostalCode
fields.label: 06.d) PSČ
fields.description: Postal code (PSČ).

fields.name: premisesMunicipality
fields.label: 06.e) název obce
fields.description: Municipality (obec) name.

fields.name: premisesMunicipalityPart
fields.label: 06.f) část obce
fields.description: Part of municipality (část obce), used where a municipality is subdivided.

fields.name: premisesDistrict
fields.label: 06.g) okres
fields.description: District (okres).

fields.name: premisesName
fields.label: 06.h) název provozovny
fields.description: Optional name of the business premises.

fields.name: premisesLocationDetail
fields.label: 06.i) umístění provozovny
fields.description: Additional detail pinpointing the premises within its address (e.g. pavilion or floor number), given where needed to locate it.

fields.name: premisesOperationStartDate
fields.label: 06.j) datum zahájení provozování živnosti v provozovně
fields.description: Actual date trade operations begin at this premises. Left blank if operations begin at the same time the trade authorization itself arises.

fields.name: premisesSubjectToBuildingApproval
fields.label: 06.k) provozovna podléhající kolaudaci
fields.description: Whether the premises is one subject to building-use approval (kolaudace).

fields.name: premisesBusinessActivityReference
fields.label: 06.l) předměty podnikání provozované v provozovně
fields.description: The sequence number(s) from §05 (or, for an unregulated trade, the activity-category number(s)) of the business activity/activities carried on at this premises.

fields.name: repTitlePrefix
fields.label: 07.a) titul
fields.description: Academic/professional title placed before the responsible representative's name, if any. Section 07-11 apply only when the applicant appoints a responsible representative (odpovědný zástupce) — required under Act No. 455/1991 Sb. §7 only for an applicant who does not personally meet a trade's special conditions — and are otherwise left blank.

fields.name: repFirstName
fields.label: 07.b) jméno
fields.description: The responsible representative's first name.

fields.name: repSurname
fields.label: 07.c) příjmení
fields.description: The responsible representative's surname.

fields.name: repTitleSuffix
fields.label: 07.d) titul
fields.description: Academic/professional title placed after the responsible representative's name, if any.

fields.name: repCitizenship
fields.label: 07.e) státní občanství
fields.description: The responsible representative's citizenship.

fields.name: repBirthSurname
fields.label: 07.f) rodné příjmení
fields.description: The responsible representative's birth surname, if different from the current surname.

fields.name: repDateOfBirth
fields.label: 07.g) datum narození
fields.description: The responsible representative's date of birth.

fields.name: repPersonalIdNumber
fields.label: 07.h) rodné číslo
fields.description: The responsible representative's rodné číslo.

fields.name: repPlaceOfBirth
fields.label: 07.i) místo narození
fields.description: The responsible representative's place of birth.

fields.name: repBirthDistrict
fields.label: 07.j) okres
fields.description: District of the responsible representative's place of birth.

fields.name: repBirthCountry
fields.label: 07.k) stát
fields.description: Country of the responsible representative's place of birth.

fields.name: repGender
fields.label: 07.l) pohlaví
fields.description: The responsible representative's sex.

fields.name: repResidenceStreet
fields.label: 08.a) název ulice
fields.description: Street name.

fields.name: repResidenceHouseNumber
fields.label: 08.b) č.p. / č.ev.
fields.description: House (conscription) number or, for a building lacking one, the registration (evidence) number.

fields.name: repResidenceOrientationNumber
fields.label: 08.c) číslo orientační
fields.description: Orientation number (a supplementary street-facing number distinct from the house/conscription number, common in Czech addressing).

fields.name: repResidencePostalCode
fields.label: 08.d) PSČ
fields.description: Postal code (PSČ).

fields.name: repResidenceMunicipality
fields.label: 08.e) název obce
fields.description: Municipality (obec) name.

fields.name: repResidenceMunicipalityPart
fields.label: 08.f) část obce
fields.description: Part of municipality (část obce), used where a municipality is subdivided.

fields.name: repResidenceDistrict
fields.label: 08.g) okres
fields.description: District (okres).

fields.name: repResidenceCountry
fields.label: 08.h) stát
fields.description: Country, when the address is outside the Czech Republic.

fields.name: repForeignResidenceStreet
fields.label: 09.a) název ulice
fields.description: Street name.

fields.name: repForeignResidenceHouseNumber
fields.label: 09.b) č.p. / č.ev.
fields.description: House (conscription) number or, for a building lacking one, the registration (evidence) number.

fields.name: repForeignResidenceOrientationNumber
fields.label: 09.c) číslo orientační
fields.description: Orientation number (a supplementary street-facing number distinct from the house/conscription number, common in Czech addressing).

fields.name: repForeignResidencePostalCode
fields.label: 09.d) PSČ
fields.description: Postal code (PSČ).

fields.name: repForeignResidenceMunicipality
fields.label: 09.e) název obce
fields.description: Municipality (obec) name.

fields.name: repForeignResidenceMunicipalityPart
fields.label: 09.f) část obce
fields.description: Part of municipality (část obce), used where a municipality is subdivided.

fields.name: repForeignResidenceDistrict
fields.label: 09.g) okres
fields.description: District (okres).

fields.name: repAppointmentDate
fields.label: 10. Datum ustanovení do funkce odpovědného zástupce
fields.description: Date the applicant appointed the responsible representative. If left blank, the appointment is taken effective from the date the trade authorization itself arises.

fields.name: repBusinessActivityReference
fields.label: 11. Ustanovení odpovědného zástupce pro předměty podnikání
fields.description: The sequence number(s) of the business activity/activities (from §05, or its annex) for which the responsible representative named above is appointed.

fields.name: notifySocialSecurityAdmin
fields.label: Část E.b) SSZ
fields.description: Whether this filing is also directed to the Czech Social Security Administration (Správa sociálního zabezpečení, ČSSZ), one of the four routing checkboxes in Part E ('Vyberte úřady, vůči kterým je podání činěno'). Gates the Part B fields below.

fields.name: ssaOfficeBranch
fields.label: Část B) v
fields.description: Name of the municipality (or part of municipality) where the applicant's locally competent ČSSZ branch office is located.

fields.name: ssaActivityStartDate
fields.label: Část B) datum zahájení samostatné výdělečné činnosti
fields.description: Date self-employed activity actually begins, notified to ČSSZ under Act No. 582/1991 Sb. Per the form's own instructions, if this date is filled in, the ČSSZ attachment (documents[].socialSecurityAdminAttachment) must also be supplied and Part E's SSZ box checked.

fields.name: notifyHealthInsuranceCompany
fields.label: Část E.c) Zdravotní pojišťovna
fields.description: Whether this filing is also directed to the applicant's public health-insurance company (zdravotní pojišťovna), one of the four routing checkboxes in Part E. Gates the Part C fields below.

fields.name: healthInsuranceOfficeBranch
fields.label: Část C) v
fields.description: The regional branch/office (krajská pobočka, expozitura, jednatelství, or detached office) of the named health-insurance company that this notification is filed with.

fields.name: healthInsuranceCompanyName
fields.label: Část C.a) název zdravotní pojišťovny
fields.description: Name of the health-insurance company the applicant is insured with as of the notification date.

fields.name: healthInsuranceCompanyCode
fields.label: Část C.b) druh (kód) ZP
fields.description: Numeric code of the named health-insurance company (e.g. 111 for Všeobecná zdravotní pojišťovna ČR).

fields.name: bankAccountNumber
fields.label: Část C.c) číslo bankovního účtu
fields.description: Bank account number from which health-insurance premium/advance payments will be made, if the applicant already holds one.

fields.name: bankRoutingCode
fields.label: Část C.c) směrový (identifikační) kód
fields.description: Routing (bank identification) code paired with bankAccountNumber.

fields.name: monthlyAdvanceAmount
fields.label: Část C.d) výše zálohy
fields.description: Monthly health-insurance premium advance amount the applicant will pay. A self-employed person's first calendar year of activity is generally subject to the statutory minimum advance under §3a odst. 2 zákona č. 592/1992 Sb. unless a higher advance is elected; some months may carry no obligation at all, per the form's own instructions.

fields.name: selfEmploymentStartDateHealthInsurance
fields.label: Část C.e) datum zahájení samostatné výdělečné činnosti
fields.description: Date self-employed activity actually begins for health-insurance purposes — not necessarily the same date as the trade authorization's own effective date.

fields.name: notifyTradeLicensingOffice
fields.label: Část E.a) Živnostenský úřad
fields.description: Whether this filing is directed to the Trade Licensing Office (živnostenský úřad) — the routing checkbox expected checked on every JRF filing, since the trade registration/concession request itself (§05) is addressed there.

fields.name: attachmentCountTradeLicensingOffice
fields.label: Část E.a) počet příloh
fields.description: Number of attachments enclosed for the Trade Licensing Office.

fields.name: attachmentCountSocialSecurityAdmin
fields.label: Část E.b) počet příloh
fields.description: Number of attachments enclosed for ČSSZ.

fields.name: attachmentCountHealthInsuranceCompany
fields.label: Část E.c) počet příloh
fields.description: Number of attachments enclosed for the health-insurance company.

fields.name: notifyTaxOffice
fields.label: Část E.d) Finanční úřad
fields.description: Whether this filing is also directed to the locally competent Tax Office (finanční úřad). Per the form's own instructions (Pokyny, Part A note), the JRF cannot itself carry a tax-registration application or a registration-data change/deregistration request — those use the Ministry of Finance's own forms, attached to this filing; this checkbox only flags that such an attachment is included.

fields.name: attachmentCountTaxOffice
fields.label: Část E.d) počet příloh
fields.description: Number of attachments enclosed for the Tax Office.

fields.name: correspondenceStreet
fields.label: Část F.a) název ulice
fields.description: Street name.

fields.name: correspondenceHouseNumber
fields.label: Část F.b) č.p. / č.ev.
fields.description: House (conscription) number or, for a building lacking one, the registration (evidence) number.

fields.name: correspondenceOrientationNumber
fields.label: Část F.c) číslo orientační
fields.description: Orientation number (a supplementary street-facing number distinct from the house/conscription number, common in Czech addressing).

fields.name: correspondencePostalCode
fields.label: Část F.d) PSČ
fields.description: Postal code (PSČ).

fields.name: correspondenceMunicipality
fields.label: Část F.e) název obce
fields.description: Municipality (obec) name.

fields.name: correspondenceMunicipalityPart
fields.label: Část F.f) část obce
fields.description: Part of municipality (část obce), used where a municipality is subdivided.

fields.name: correspondenceDistrict
fields.label: Část F.g) okres
fields.description: District (okres).

fields.name: correspondenceUseForFutureProceedings
fields.label: Část F.h) adresu použít i pro následující řízení
fields.description: Whether the applicant elects to have this correspondence address used for delivery in all future proceedings by any Czech trade licensing office and affected administrative authority, not only this filing.

fields.name: phoneNumber
fields.label: Část G.a) telefon
fields.description: Contact telephone number.

fields.name: dataBoxId
fields.label: Část G.b) datová schránka
fields.description: ID of the applicant's data box (datová schránka), the Czech state's mandatory electronic-delivery mailbox system.

fields.name: emailAddress
fields.label: Část G.c) e-mail
fields.description: Contact email address.

fields.name: submitterFirstName
fields.label: jméno podatele
fields.description: First name of the person physically submitting the filing, when different from the applicant (e.g. a proxy holder).

fields.name: submitterSurname
fields.label: příjmení podatele
fields.description: Surname of the person physically submitting the filing, when different from the applicant.

fields.name: signaturePlace
fields.label: V
fields.description: Place where the form is signed.

fields.name: signatureDate
fields.label: dne
fields.description: Date the form is signed.

documents.label: Příloha pro správu sociálního zabezpečení (ČSSZ attachment, form SSZ_1_.pdf)
documents.sourceRef: JRF FO Část E.b; Pokyny Část B

documents.label: Seznam oborů činností náležejících do živnosti volné (list of unregulated-trade activity categories used to select freeTradeCategoryNumbers)
Předmět podnikání annex (second and further business-activity entries beyond businessActivityDescription's pořadové číslo 1.)
Odpovědný zástupce annex (second and further responsible representatives, when the applicant appoints more than one)
Provozovny annex (second and further business premises, beyond the single premises this schema models in §06)
Plná moc (power of attorney), when the filing is made by a representative on the applicant's behalf

Doklad o odborné způsobilosti (professional-qualification document, or a document issued by a special authority), required for a craft (řemeslná), bound (vázaná), or licensed (koncesovaná) trade — not applicable to an unregulated (volná) trade
